TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 7, Luo Yunxi , squliq na Cyukoku'. qyanux na sraral Luo Yunxi minkahul Chengdu, Sichuan na Cyukoku. pinqbaqan nya Luo Yunxi, t'aring kawas tay 2006 tehuk kawas tay 2010, mqwas biru sa Shanghai m_yugi' pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya Luo Yunxi hiya ga m'engi. Luo Yunxi ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga (2018) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, luo junxi , s~…ēquliq na ¶~ ®jukoku Ē. qjanux na s~…ēraral luo junxi minkańßul ¶~ ®ńßeŇč*u, s~…ēi ¶~ ®ńßuan na ¶~ ®jukoku. pinqő≤aqan nja luo junxi, t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk kawas~…ē taj ****, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa s~…ēńßaŇčńßai m…ôju…£i Ē pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja luo junxi ńßija …£a m ĒeŇči. luo junxi ima pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja zjuwaw …£a (****) ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
S.FORM: kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 7, Luo Yunxi , squliq na Cyukoku'. qyanux na sraral Luo Yunxi minkahul Chengdu, Sichuan na Cyukoku. pinqbaqan nya Luo Yunxi, t'aring kawas tay 2006 tehuk kawas tay 2010, mqwas biru sa Shanghai m_yugi' pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya Luo Yunxi hiya ga m'engi. Luo Yunxi ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga (2018) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
